3:
Having initially dismissed you as a mere errand <If(PlayerParameter(4))>girl<Else/>boy</If>, Faezahr is impressed by the quality of your craftsmanship, and readily agrees to present the weapons you made to his Gridanian contacts. 

※The next blacksmith quest will be available from Brithael upon reaching level 20.

59:
...Well, it's his neck.
I'll work with you, smith, and I'll even keep my diction simple. Taking instruction from that drunkard will have dulled your wits. Now listen.
